name: portal-escolar
description: Portal para visualização de notas escolares

scripts.install-all: npm run backend:install && npm run frontend:install && npm run scripts:install
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && ng build
scripts.cadastrar-aluno: cd scripts && npm install && node cadastrar-aluno.js
scripts.seed: cd scripts && npm install && node seeder.js
